evidence.text: llm-eval-simple is a simple LLM evaluation framework with intermediate actions and prompt pattern selection # LLM Eval Simple [![Python Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/python-3.13+-blue.svg)](https://www.python.org/downloads/) [![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT) ![benchmark report](./static/benchmark-report.png) A simple tool for evaluating Large Language Models (LLMs) using a set of prompts and expected answers. It supports testing multiple models via an OpenAI-compatible API endpoint, measures response times, evaluates correctness
